pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly creates patient doc with 'firstName': 'Maria', 'lastName': 'Santos'
setup_task.sh PUTs the patient document to patient_p1_0001
setup_task.sh PUTs the appointment document to appointment_p1_taskseed
setup_task.sh sets 'provider' to 'Dr. Emily Johnson' in the seeded appointment doc
Task description and verifier.py require the provider to be updated to 'Dr. James Chen'
Verifier accepts 'James Chen' as a lenient match for the required provider update
setup_task.sh dynamically sets the appointment to 10:00 AM tomorrow

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetically generated patient named Maria Santos (ID patient_p1_0001) with an appointment (ID appointment_p1_taskseed) dynamically scheduled for 10:00 AM tomorrow. The appointment is initially assigned to 'Dr. Emily Johnson', and the task correctly expects the provider to be updated to 'Dr. James Chen' while leaving the appointment time unchanged.
